description.ko: 에메랄드 이끼와 황금색 액체 빛으로 이루어진 호흡계를 통해 생명력의 흐름을 표현한 작품.
description.en: A representation of organic vitality, depicting a breathing respiratory system made of emerald moss and golden liquid light in a weightless liquid void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Thalassic Lung.' A central breathing respiratory organ made of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular networks, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid. Rhythmic pulses exhale #FFE66D golden liquid light ribbons that drift like silk through a deep underwater atmosphere. Macro focus on cellular, semi-permeable textures and bioluminescent mists. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh.
